task: Implemented voice notification system with quota pre-warning, speak() sink gated by user preference, integration into stop/notification hooks, askr init prompt, and comprehensive test coverage.
discussion_summary: The voice notification feature is now complete across 5 stages: a speak() sink that respects voice_notifications config preference, wiring into task-done and HITL notification events via stop.py hooks, user onboarding prompt in askr init, quota pre-warning at 75% threshold with deduplication via quota_warned_sessions, and 11 new tests covering gating, config round-trip, and quota-warning behavior. All commits are pushed and tests pass.

accomplishments.what: Added speak() sink function gated by voice_notifications preference
Wired speak() into stop.py notification hooks for task-done and HITL events
Added voice_notifications prompt to askr init flow
Implemented quota pre-warning at 75% threshold with quota_warned_sessions deduplication
Created test_voice.py with 11 tests covering speak() gating, config round-trip, and quota-warning scenarios
All 5 stages committed and pushed to main

next_actions.action: Investigate guard_runner.py's non-blocking notification.json path (type: guard_warning) — verify if it is truly dead code or if pre_tool_use.py HOOK_MAP needs updating to invoke it
next_actions.why: Open goal notes this path is never invoked from pre_tool_use.py, HOOK_MAP, or .claude/settings.json; Phase 3.5's IDE popup for non-blocking guard warnings cannot fire today regardless of extension.js whitelist fix

next_actions.action: Review and test the full voice notification flow end-to-end in a real session to confirm speak() is called at correct times and respects user preference
next_actions.why: Unit tests pass but integration with actual task lifecycle and notification events should be validated

decisions.decision: Voice notifications are gated by voice_notifications boolean preference stored in config
decisions.reason: Allows users to opt-in/out of audio feedback without code changes

decisions.decision: Quota pre-warning fires at 75% threshold and deduplicates via quota_warned_sessions set in lifecycle state
decisions.reason: Prevents spam of repeated warnings while giving user early notice before hitting hard limit

decisions.decision: speak() is a sink function that logs and returns early if voice_notifications is False
decisions.reason: Simplifies call sites — no conditional logic needed before calling speak()

relational_files.why: Defines quota_warned_sessions state and lifecycle management for voice notifications
Integrates speak() calls into task-done and HITL notification event hooks
Prompts user for voice_notifications preference during askr init
Provided test pattern and mocking approach for lifecycle internals used in test_voice.py

blockers: guard_runner.py non-blocking notification.json path (type: guard_warning) is dead code — unclear if this is intentional or requires HOOK_MAP fix
